headline: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
summary: OpenAI is shutting down its ChatGPT Atlas browser. It was announced less than a year ago in October. The shutdown comes amidst news about ChatGPT Work.

headline: The floatable, powerful Soundcore Boom 2 speaker is over half off
summary: The Anker Soundcore Boom 2 Bluetooth speaker is on sale for $69.99. This deal at Woot saves you $20 compared to other retailers. The offer is valid until July 10th.

headline: Google will now tell you if an ad was made with AI
summary: Google will label ads created or edited with AI. Users can find this information in a new section within "My Ad Center." This applies to ads on Google Search, Discover, and YouTube.

headline: Google's Nest Thermostat has hit its best price of the year
summary: Google's Nest Thermostat is on sale for $79 on Amazon. This represents a $50 discount and is its lowest price this year. The smart device helps cut cooling costs with energy-saving features.

headline: Save 50% Off Anker's Newly Released SOLIX S2000 2,048Wh 2,400W LiFePO4 Power Station
summary: Anker's new SOLIX S2000 power station is available at 50% off. It boasts 2,048Wh, 2,400W, and 96% efficiency. This is Anker's lightest 2kWh power station.

headline: The Thermaltake LGCS GeForce RTX 5070 Gaming PC Drops to $1,400 Shipped
summary: The Thermaltake LGCS RTX 5070 Gaming PC is now $1,400. It offers strong performance for 1080p and 1440p gaming. The PC is also capable of running games in 4K resolution.

headline: How to Play the Fallout Games in Chronological Order
summary: Discover the correct chronological play order for Fallout games. This guide helps new players navigate the series. Plan your journey through the Wasteland effectively.

headline: The Adorable LEGO Eevee Pokémon Got Its First Price Cut
summary: The LEGO Pokémon Eevee set has received its first price cut. It has dropped to a new all-time low price. Find this adorable building set on Amazon.

headline: Burnham set to be next PM as 322 Labour MPs back him in first nomination tally
summary: Andy Burnham is set to become the next UK Prime Minister. He has secured nominations from 322 Labour MPs. The former Greater Manchester mayor is unopposed.

headline: Heat health alerts extended as record for most 34C days in a year broken
summary: Heat health alerts have been extended across England. The country broke its record for most 34C days in a year. Amber alerts predict disruption to health services and travel.

headline: Tehran launches more strikes after explosions reported in southern Iran
summary: Tehran has launched new strikes following explosions in southern Iran. Centcom reports hitting 90 Iranian targets in this round. The Iranian health ministry states 14 deaths since Tuesday.

headline: Ukrainian agent accused of murdering Monaco bomb suspect changes story
summary: A Ukrainian agent accused of murder has changed his testimony. He is linked to the killing of Anastasiia Berezovska. Her body was found dumped in the woods.
